 主角人设简直我是无可挑剔了，没有看到雷点什么的，真的是爽死
很黑暗的世界观，但是整个世界都在偏向主角的感觉，爽啊啊啊啊。。。。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728196424,"group_id":"7375091172827466776","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"如果...","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzZB5ciGmK80Mg2eIrfGwjPdvjXZEHiavtRUEK0/d6NL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ffcbcb4249a346828449c7ed98e9b0f9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709206&x-signature=KyHmk5eLBKBZeVThiyTCuH8DGgQ%3D","user_id":"4372136216261760","user_name":"十二纷月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4372136216261760","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7375091172827466776","book_info":{"abstract":"【无CP＋无女主＋热血少年漫＋全员恶人＋主角纯反派不洗白＋群像】
  《恶院命格》是一部包括热血、温馨、休闲、喜剧等因素的热血少年漫，因其画风的精致、剧情的出其不意和主角们的意难平收获了一众粉丝的喜爱。
  然而作者在高潮部分断更，一断就断三年，在读者哀怨的等待中，三年后番外篇开始更新，漫画论坛顿时登顶第一！
  那是一个新的角色——他毒舌、张口第一句话就是让人去死、眼神也是止不住的厌恶、经常会提各种不合理的要求别人执行。
  所有读者在一开场抱着对新角色的厌恶，然而……
  ［这简直是在要我命！又一次！又一次救了所有人！我的宝儿你低头看看你那废了的手啊！］
  ［洛字清你敢不敢回头看看你好朋友那痛苦的眼睛！敢不敢看看你挚友难过的表情！］
  ［天杀的作者你不要动他！］
  ［不要下线！不可以下线！来个人快救救他！快救救他啊！］
  ［他救了所有人，却偏偏不愿意拉自己一把，这是什么拿了短命白月光剧本的角色啊！］
  洛字清：有没有一种可能，他真的想快点下线！他本来就不属于这个该死的热血世界！不是说炮灰下线的最快吗！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e7fef93793d79efa4bc692e1a78a35cc","author":"一只月兔","author_id":"","book_id":"7375091172827466776","book_name":"被迫成为热血漫主角后他直接死遁","book_short_name":"恶院命格","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7400070021520572952","read_count":"34567","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1033266"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"328","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,反派,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eae373a60ccbd03752476c14f92486e9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321522&x-signature=ATorM%2BJDw3tiS2yYm%2F74vlgwD4Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3236570206319069","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207584239AAB836DE05695F3615"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":389,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7568,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":17378},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"privacy_type":1,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7407735541616837438","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"月兔大大你终于回来了，一如既往的臣服于大大的剧情人设，淡淡的疯感，爽，爱死了，追更启动，想问一下枝枝那本真的更不了了吗，加油月兔"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724751452,"group_id":"7375091172827466776","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不好意思癫子来了么么叽","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxDKJVF2+YYWROi46siChYtXlUuSce6enLrHmCE9X/o1","gender":2,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4389725802867736","user_name":"用户43897258"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4389725802867736","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705032158,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7375091172827466776","book_info":{"abstract":"【无CP＋无女主＋热血少年漫＋全员恶人＋主角纯反派不洗白＋群像】
  《恶院命格》是一部包括热血、温馨、休闲、喜剧等因素的热血少年漫，因其画风的精致、剧情的出其不意和主角们的意难平收获了一众粉丝的喜爱。
  然而作者在高潮部分断更，一断就断三年，在读者哀怨的等待中，三年后番外篇开始更新，漫画论坛顿时登顶第一！
  那是一个新的角色——他毒舌、张口第一句话就是让人去死、眼神也是止不住的厌恶、经常会提各种不合理的要求别人执行。
  所有读者在一开场抱着对新角色的厌恶，然而……
  ［这简直是在要我命！又一次！又一次救了所有人！我的宝儿你低头看看你那废了的手啊！］
  ［洛字清你敢不敢回头看看你好朋友那痛苦的眼睛！敢不敢看看你挚友难过的表情！］
  ［天杀的作者你不要动他！］
  ［不要下线！不可以下线！来个人快救救他！快救救他啊！］
  ［他救了所有人，却偏偏不愿意拉自己一把，这是什么拿了短命白月光剧本的角色啊！］
  洛字清：有没有一种可能，他真的想快点下线！他本来就不属于这个该死的热血世界！不是说炮灰下线的最快吗！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e7fef93793d79efa4bc692e1a78a35cc","author":"一只月兔","author_id":"","book_id":"7375091172827466776","book_name":"被迫成为热血漫主角后他直接死遁","book_short_name":"恶院命格","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7400070021520572952","read_count":"34567","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1033266"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"328","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,反派,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eae373a60ccbd03752476c14f92486e9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321522&x-signature=ATorM%2BJDw3tiS2yYm%2F74vlgwD4Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3236570206319069","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207584239AAB836DE05695F3615"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"di 能写原剧情吗(๑•̀ㅁ•́ฅ)","text_exts":[{"e":6,"s":0,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz8ZeBtytH4Zk/C91/Lbu3Gzav18Nagp/5G8kVFDhW1r"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725725970,"group_id":"7375091172827466776","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110967571047"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7375091172827466776","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7907,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7411915756389040958","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"妈耶，好看。主角这个半死不活的精神状态，和刀子嘴豆腐心，边骂边救还骂不过的反差感，我真的很爱(⌯︎¤̴̶̷̀ω¤̴̶̷́)✧︎！ 感觉每个人物，形象都十分鲜明٩(๑ᵒ̴̶̷͈᷄ᗨᵒ̴̶̷͈᷅)و。主角身边的几个，一个武力值超强，有些腹黑（?），经常和主角拌嘴，两个人都是可爱宝宝，拌嘴时喜欢看对方吃瘪(◔◡◔)，人又帅又痞。一个智商超高，腹黑宝宝:)，但又是个可怜娃，受了主角霸道开导:)，有种理智的疯批感。还有一个对主角眼冒爱心，好像有那啥受虐症（啊，是病娇吗！喜欢喜欢！），是个可以模仿他人能力的得力干将，长得乖乖的。然后，本来开始的时候，觉得原剧情（背景故事）有点乱，看到后面妈耶这个原剧情真的挺好，还很刀。所以！亲爱的作者大大可不可以出一个原剧情(´◊ω◊｀)？真的想看刀刀的剧情！Oh ，感觉这本书真的很好！真的超爱！推荐推荐₍₍ ง(*Ӧ)ว ⁾⁾！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725725893,"group_id":"7375091172827466776","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈，就这个作业“爽”！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/1IfpolWeQfXpeGAiGoIig=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7e2ba28d814f437e87822b5382ec5c5b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709399&x-signature=Kp1meHiaR%2Fb5ch%2Bpwtu%2FP80zOZY%3D","user_id":"110967571047","user_name":"都栗子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110967571047","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7375091172827466776","book_info":{"abstract":"【无CP＋无女主＋热血少年漫＋全员恶人＋主角纯反派不洗白＋群像】

  那是一个新的角色——他毒舌、张口第一句话就是让人去死、眼神也是止不住的厌恶、经常会提各种不合理的要求别人执行。
